ontology.rdfs:label: AI Prompt PWA Architecture Ontology
ontology.rdfs:comment: Formal description of the ai-prompt package architecture — components, hooks, services, types, and external integrations — expressed as an OWL-inspired JSON-LD ontology.

classes.label: Module
classes.comment: Abstract root class for every artefact in the system.

classes.label: Source Module
classes.comment: A TypeScript / TSX file that is part of the project source.

classes.label: External Module
classes.comment: A system, API, or library that lives outside the project source.

classes.label: Entry Point
classes.comment: Root bootstrapping file. Mounts the React tree and registers the PWA service worker.

classes.label: React Component
classes.comment: A TypeScript function component that returns JSX and participates in the React render tree.

classes.label: Root Component
classes.comment: Singleton top-level component; owns global UI state, orchestrates all children, and wires together hooks and services.

classes.label: Layout Component
classes.comment: Structural UI component responsible for a distinct visual region (message list, input pane, viewer panel).

classes.label: Navigation Component
classes.comment: Component that lets the user navigate between conversations or app sections.

classes.label: Overlay Component
classes.comment: Full-screen modal or side-sheet that overlays the main content.

classes.label: Primitive Component
classes.comment: Small, reusable UI unit with no global state or service calls.

classes.label: React Hook
classes.comment: A custom hook (use* function) that encapsulates reusable stateful logic.

classes.label: AI Stream Hook
classes.comment: Hook that manages AI streaming lifecycle: idle → streaming → done / error, with abort support.

classes.label: Storage Hook
classes.comment: Hook that provides live/reactive IndexedDB query results using Dexie useLiveQuery.

classes.label: Input Hook
classes.comment: Hook that captures user input from non-keyboard channels (clipboard paste, drag & drop).

classes.label: Service
classes.comment: Pure TypeScript module that implements a domain capability without any React dependency.

classes.label: AI Service
classes.comment: Multi-provider streaming engine. Dispatches to one of four provider adapters (Anthropic, Proxy, Ollama, OpenAI) based on AppSettings.

classes.label: Persistence Service
classes.comment: CRUD wrapper around the Dexie database (conversations, messages, settings tables).

classes.label: Media Service
classes.comment: PDF loading and text extraction via pdfjs-dist; manages blob URL lifecycle.

classes.label: Network Service
classes.comment: Generic fetch-based HTTP utilities (proxy helper).

classes.label: Type Module
classes.comment: Pure type-definition file. Contains interfaces, discriminated unions, type guards, and constants with no runtime logic beyond type guards.

classes.label: AI Provider
classes.comment: External AI inference endpoint. Receives a formatted message list and streams token deltas.

classes.label: Storage Engine
classes.comment: Browser-native key-value / object-store persistence backend.

classes.label: Library
classes.comment: Third-party npm package used as a building block.

classes.label: Browser API
classes.comment: Native browser capability accessed directly without an npm wrapper.

objectProperties.label: renders
objectProperties.comment: Subject component includes object component in its JSX return tree.

objectProperties.label: usesHook
objectProperties.comment: Component or hook calls the target hook inside its function body.

objectProperties.label: callsService
objectProperties.comment: Component or hook directly invokes a service function (import-level dependency).

objectProperties.label: persistsUsing
objectProperties.comment: Persistence service stores and retrieves data via the target storage engine.

objectProperties.label: streamsWith
objectProperties.comment: AI service dispatches streaming requests to the target AI provider.

objectProperties.label: dependsOnLib
objectProperties.comment: Service or component has a runtime dependency on the target npm library.

objectProperties.label: usesAPI
objectProperties.comment: Hook or service directly invokes the target browser-native API.

objectProperties.label: registers
objectProperties.comment: Entry point registers or bootstraps the target browser API (e.g. service worker).

objectProperties.label: typedWith
objectProperties.comment: Module imports and relies on types/interfaces defined in the target type module.

objectProperties.label: injectsContext
objectProperties.comment: Media service provides extracted text context that the AI service embeds in messages.
objectProperties.note: Conceptual dependency: PDF text extracted by pdf.ts is injected into AI message content in App.tsx before being passed to ai.ts

dataProperties.label: layer
dataProperties.comment: Architectural layer: Presentation | Logic | Service | Domain | External | Infrastructure

dataProperties.label: streamProtocol
dataProperties.comment: Streaming protocol used by an AI provider: SSE | NDJSON | SDK-stream

dataProperties.label: authMethod
dataProperties.comment: How the provider is authenticated: APIKey | None | BearerToken

axioms.note: A child can be rendered by multiple parents (e.g. ViewerPanel conditional render)
If a component calls a persistence service, it indirectly persists via the storage engine

individuals.label: main.tsx
individuals.description: Application bootstrap: calls ReactDOM.createRoot, registers the Vite PWA service worker, and renders <App />.

individuals.label: App.tsx
individuals.description: Root component. Owns global state: activeConvId, settings, pendingFiles, viewerOpen/Width, streamText, sidebarOpen. Orchestrates conversation CRUD, AI submission, and layout.

individuals.label: ConversationSidebar.tsx
individuals.description: Scrollable list of past conversations. Emits onSelect / onCreate / onDelete events. Highlights the active conversation.

individuals.label: MessageList.tsx
individuals.description: Renders the conversation message bubbles. Shows streaming token delta with animated cursor. Auto-scrolls to bottom.

individuals.label: PromptInput.tsx
individuals.description: Controlled input area. Accepts files prop from parent (App). Integrates clipboard paste, drag-drop, and file picker. Renders FilePreview chips.

individuals.label: FilePreview.tsx
individuals.description: Compact row of attached-file chips rendered inside PromptInput. Images show thumbnail + lightbox; PDFs show expandable iframe.

individuals.label: ViewerPanel.tsx
individuals.description: Resizable side panel (220–680 px) between sidebar and chat. Shows thumbnail strip + full preview for pending files and conversation images. Handles its own resize via mousedown/mousemove/mouseup.

individuals.label: SettingsPanel.tsx
individuals.description: Full-screen overlay for provider/model/system-prompt configuration. Contains provider-specific sub-fields and a connection-test button.

individuals.label: useAI.ts
individuals.description: Wraps streamCompletion with React state: { status: idle|streaming|error, error, stream(), abort() }. Manages AbortController lifecycle.

individuals.label: useDb.ts
individuals.description: Exports useConversations() and useMessages(convId) — both backed by Dexie useLiveQuery for reactive re-render on DB change.

individuals.label: useClipboard.ts
individuals.description: useClipboardPaste handles paste events (image/text). readImageFromClipboard reads programmatically via navigator.clipboard.read().

individuals.label: useDragDrop.ts
individuals.description: Returns { isDragging, dragProps, processFiles }. Handles dragenter/over/leave/drop; dispatches images to onImages and PDFs to onPdfs callbacks.

individuals.label: ai.ts
individuals.description: streamCompletion() switches on AppSettings.provider to invoke one of four adapters: streamAnthropic (SDK stream), streamProxy (SSE fetch), streamOllama (NDJSON stream), streamOpenAI (SSE fetch). Shared readSSE() parser for Anthropic proxy + OpenAI format.

individuals.label: db.ts
individuals.description: Dexie v4 database (ai-prompt-db). Tables: conversations (id,createdAt,updatedAt), messages (id,conversationId,createdAt), settings (key). Exports: getSettings, saveSetting, saveSettings, createConversation, deleteConversation, addMessage, updateMessageContent.

individuals.label: pdf.ts
individuals.description: loadPdf(file) extracts text via pdfjs-dist and creates a blob URL for iframe preview. revokePdfUrl() frees the blob URL on removal. Worker configured via Vite ?url import.

individuals.label: api.ts
individuals.description: Generic HTTP fetch helper for proxy communication.

individuals.label: types/index.ts
individuals.description: Core domain model. Key types: ImageAttachment (kind:'image'), PdfAttachment (kind:'pdf',blobUrl,pageCount,text), FileAttachment (union), Message, Conversation, AppSettings, ApiProvider (union), AIModel (union). Type guards: isPdf(), isImage().

individuals.label: Anthropic Claude API
individuals.description: Direct Anthropic API via @anthropic-ai/sdk. Supports vision (base64 image blocks). Models: claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5.

individuals.label: Server Proxy (SSE)
individuals.description: Self-hosted backend that proxies Anthropic API calls. Useful for hiding API keys from the browser.

individuals.label: Ollama (Local LLM)
individuals.description: Local LLM runner. Vision-capable models receive base64 images. No API key required.

individuals.label: OpenAI / Compatible API
individuals.description: OpenAI or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g. Azure, Groq, Mistral). Images sent as image_url blocks.

individuals.label: IndexedDB (via Dexie v4)
individuals.description: Browser-native structured storage. Three object stores: conversations, messages, settings. Reactive queries via Dexie useLiveQuery.

individuals.label: pdfjs-dist
individuals.description: Mozilla PDF.js library for client-side PDF parsing and text extraction. Worker loaded via Vite ?url import.

individuals.label: @anthropic-ai/sdk
individuals.description: Official Anthropic TypeScript SDK. Used with dangerouslyAllowBrowser:true for direct browser calls.

individuals.label: Dexie v4 + dexie-react-hooks
individuals.description: Ergonomic IndexedDB wrapper. AppDatabase extends Dexie with typed tables.

individuals.label: Clipboard API
individuals.description: navigator.clipboard.read() for programmatic image access; ClipboardEvent.clipboardData for paste events.

individuals.label: Drag & Drop API
individuals.description: HTML Drag and Drop event model (dragenter, dragleave, dragover, drop) with DataTransfer.files access.

individuals.label: Service Worker (PWA)
individuals.description: Workbox-powered service worker generated by vite-plugin-pwa. Enables offline caching and installable PWA behaviour.

assertions.subject: :aiService
assertions.note: used only for Anthropic provider path

assertions.subject: :pdfService
assertions.note: Extracted PDF text injected by App.tsx before AI call
